title: Interview outfit
warnings: The outfit should support the conversation.

title: Interview — full checklist
steps: Chinos, straight trousers, dark jeans or skirt.
Blazer or cardigan depending on weather.

title: Smart casual meeting
dontDo: do not mix too many patterns

title: Meeting — smart casual
summary: Outfit for a business or semi-formal meeting.
steps: Chinos, straight trousers, dark jeans or skirt.
Blazer or cardigan for more formality.
dontDo: do not choose pieces you must constantly adjust

title: School or university
summary: Comfortable outfit for a long day.
steps: T-shirt, hoodie, sweater or casual shirt.
dontDo: do not wear new shoes for a long day

title: University — all-day outfit
steps: Hoodie, cardigan or jacket removable indoors.
dontDo: do not dress only for a photo

title: Party or night out
steps: Wear shoes for the whole evening.

title: Party — polished option
steps: One stronger color, texture or accessory.
Check bag, weather and freedom of movement.

title: Walk and weather
dontDo: do not ignore rain or wind

title: Walk — practical outfit
steps: Umbrella, hat or glasses according to weather.
Check phone, keys and hourly weather.
dontDo: do not choose slippery shoes for rain

title: Family occasion — neat
summary: Safe option for dinner, holiday or ceremony.
steps: Straight trousers, chinos, skirt or dress.

title: Rain-ready variant
dontDo: do not wear delicate shoes in heavy rain

title: Rain — checklist
steps: Bottom that does not pull water.
After arrival check hems and shoes.

title: Cold weather layers
summary: Adjustable outfit for cold and warm spaces.
dontDo: do not rely on one thick item

title: Cold — layered outfit
summary: Warm outfit that still looks consistent.

title: Simple outfit plan
dontDo: judge only outfit fit, not yourself

title: Universal outfit plan
summary: Method for building an outfit for any occasion.
steps: Add or remove layer for weather.
Match bottom by color and material.
Match shoes to place and walking time.
dontDo: do not build outfit from appearance criticism
